title: inula etrusca
intro: Inula etrusca, also known as Etruscan inula, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Inula etrusca include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Inula etrusca can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
